basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Roorkee website. Candidates holding a Master's Degree in Engineering/ Technology (Agricultural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Water Resources, Hydrology, Environmental Engineering, or Fisheries Science) along with GATE or CSIR UGC NET qualification are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 16-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in details are shared b

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Agricultural Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Water Resources/ Hydrology/ Environmental Engineering/ Fisheries Science from a recognized University or equivalent, and GATE or CSIR-UGC NET Qualified.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Qualifications: Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Agricultural Engineering/Civil Engineering/Water Resources/Hydrology/Environmental Engineering/Fisheries Science from a recognized University or equivalent GATE or CSIR-UGC NET Qualified Experience: Experience in environmental flow modelling (Hydrological, Hydraulic, Water Quality Modelling, and Habitat Modeling). Exposure to handling any hydrological and hydraulic modeling software, such as SWAT, HEC-RAS, MODFLOW, QUAL2K, HEC-EFM, and habitat simulation software like PHABSIM, etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37000/- + HRA as per institute rules
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37000/- + HRA as per institute rules

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_roorkee_i: Rs. 37000/- + HRA as per institute rules

Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Agricultural Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Water Resources/ Hydrology/ Environmental Engineering/ Fisheries Science from a recognized University or equivalent, and GATE or CSIR-UGC NET Qualified.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Qualifications: Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Agricultural Engineering/Civil Engineering/Water Resources/Hydrology/Environmental Engineering/Fisheries Science from a recognized University or equivalent GATE or CSIR-UGC NET Qualified Experience: Experience in environmental flow modelling (Hydrological, Hydraulic, Water Quality Modelling, and Habitat Modeling). Exposure to handling any hydrological and hydraulic modeling software, such as SWAT, HEC-RAS, MODFLOW, QUAL2K, HEC-EFM, and habitat simulation software like PHABSIM, etc.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37000/- + HRA as per institute rules

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 is Junior Research Fellow (JRF). This is a project-based research position at the institute.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in date for JRF at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee is scheduled for 16 July 2026. Candidates must report on time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required qualification for JRF?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in relevant fields and must be GATE or CSIR-UGC NET Qualified to be eligible for the JRF post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will receive a salary of Rs. 37000/- per month plus HRA as per the institute rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly with required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the job location for this JRF position?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will be Roorkee, Uttarakhand, at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee campus.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment at IIT Roorkee. Please check the PDF for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for JRF?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee involves a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their performance.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring original documents, self-attested photocopies of certificates, a detailed CV, and recent passport-size photographs for the walk-in interview.
